name: Danmachi after season 5 (Non Canon)
description:
A non-canon DanMachi RPG story — post-Season 5

Freya’s gone. The gods are shaken.

Orario’s changing — and something weird is happening outside the city. The Dungeon feels… off.

This is a story-driven, player-led RPG set in the world of DanMachi, but the path? That’s all up to you.

No dice. No stats. Just choices.

Be anyone. Explore anything.

The world adapts to how you play.

Your presence? Just a rumor — for now.

Step in, stir the city, or vanish into the shadows.

Whatever you become, the gods are watching.

And someone’s already whispering your name.

Note: Use a proxy because Janitor LLM can't handle this much token. Have fun and please provide a feedback!
creator: KekeDesu
